parameters.name: HardExpire
parameters.description:
Specifies whether login is blocked after a password expires.

- true: After a password expires, the RAM user cannot log on to the console. An Alibaba Cloud account or a RAM user with administrative permission must reset the password before the RAM user can log on.

- false (default): After a password expires, the RAM user can change the password and then log on.

parameters.name: InitialPasswordAge
parameters.description:
Validity period for initial passwords. Initial passwords apply to newly created users or users whose console logon settings are re-enabled.

Valid values: 0 to 90. Unit: days.

Default value: 14.

A value of 0 disables this constraint.

parameters.name: InterceptRiskPasswordOnApi
parameters.description:
Specifies whether risky passwords are blocked when set using OpenAPI.

Default value: false

- true: When setting a password using OpenAPI, the new password must not be a threat password.

- false: When setting a password using OpenAPI, the new password can be a threat password.

Default value: false

parameters.name: MaxLoginAttemps
parameters.description:
Maximum number of failed password attempts. After the specified number of consecutive incorrect password attempts, the account is locked for one hour.

Valid values: 0 to 32.

Default value: 0, which disables this constraint.

parameters.name: MaxPasswordAge
parameters.description:
Password validity period.

Valid values: 0 to 1095. Unit: days.

Default value: 0, which means passwords never expire.

parameters.name: MinimumPasswordDifferentCharacter
parameters.description:
Minimum number of unique characters in a password.

Valid values: 0 to 8.

Default value: 0, which imposes no restriction.

parameters.name: MinimumPasswordLength
parameters.description:
Minimum password length.

Valid values: 8 to 32. Default value: 8.

parameters.name: PasswordNotContainUserName
parameters.description:
Specifies whether passwords can contain the username.

- true: Passwords cannot contain the username.

- false (default): Passwords can contain the username.

parameters.name: PasswordReusePrevention
parameters.description:
Prevents reuse of previous passwords.

Valid values: 0 to 24. This value specifies how many previous passwords are blocked from reuse.

Default value: 0, which disables this check.

parameters.name: RequireLowercaseCharacters
parameters.description:
Specifies whether passwords must contain lowercase letters.

- true

- false (default)

parameters.name: RequireNumbers
parameters.description:
Specifies whether passwords must contain numbers.

- true

- false (default)

parameters.name: RequireSymbols
parameters.description:
Specifies whether passwords must contain symbols.

- true

- false (default)

parameters.name: RequireUppercaseCharacters
parameters.description:
Specifies whether passwords must contain uppercase letters.

- true

- false (default)
